mapper.select: SELECT CGCM.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST@DL_MSP CGM , CMN_GRP_CD_MST@DL_MSP CGCM WHERE CGM.GRP_ID = CGCM.GRP_ID AND CGM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGCM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGM.GRP_ID = 'CMN0202'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND NEW_KT_ORG_ID IS NOT NULL
SELECT NEW_KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST@DL_MSP WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND NEW_KT_ORG_ID IS NOT NULL
